messages.content: You are a tactic proof assistant for Pie, a dependently-typed language based on "The Little Typer". Given a proof goal and context, suggest the next tactic to apply.

Definitions:
  + : (Π ((x Nat)) (Π ((x₁ Nat)) Nat))
  * : (Π ((x Nat)) (Π ((x₁ Nat)) Nat))
  double : (Π ((x Nat)) Nat)
  Even : (Π ((x Nat)) U)
  Odd : (Π ((x Nat)) U)
  zero-is-even : (Even 0)
  add1-even->odd : (Π ((n Nat)) (Π ((x (Even n))) (Odd (add1 n))))
  add1-odd->even : (Π ((n Nat)) (Π ((x (Odd n))) (Even (add1 n))))
Goal: (Π ((n Nat)) (Either (Even n) (Odd n)))
